themes.title: Performance Optimization
themes.description: Enhancing the performance of search queries and overall user experience.

themes.title: Security and Compliance
themes.description: Implementing necessary security measures and compliance with standards.

themes.title: User Experience Improvement
themes.description: Gathering user feedback and improving accessibility and engagement.

milestones.name: MVP Development
milestones.description: Establishing the foundational features for the SearchBoost Query Engine.
milestones.success_criteria: Feature flag is implemented and tested successfully.

milestones.name: V1 Feature Implementation
milestones.description: Implementing key features to enhance search performance and security.
milestones.success_criteria: All V1 features are implemented and pass QA testing.

milestones.name: V2 Feature Implementation
milestones.description: Adding advanced features for user feedback, performance monitoring, and security.
milestones.success_criteria: All V2 features are implemented, and user feedback is collected and analyzed.

sequencing.reason: MVP Development must be completed to enable the implementation of V1 features.
V1 Feature Implementation must be completed to proceed with V2 features.

mvp.goal: Establish foundational features for the SearchBoost Query Engine.

v1.goal: Enhance search performance and security with key features.

v2.goal: Implement advanced features for user experience improvement.
